item.name: 2B Automaton
item.description:
For when you need the company of a compact version of an advanced combat android dressed in a distinctive subculture style.

Use item to acquire the 2B automaton minion.
item.tooltip:
So there're androids, which
are machines, but also other
machines, and also...
   - Dig Site Chief
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 150 and knocks back all enemies within range.
